parameters.name: merge
parameters.label: Merge
parameters.description: Specify whether to merge point data or primitive data. This parameter is only enabled when there is an input connected to the .

parameters.name: float
parameters.label: Add Float Attributes
parameters.description: Add a non-standard attribute specified in the point or primitive as a float.

parameters.name: int
parameters.label: Add Int Attributes
parameters.description: Add a non-standard attribute specified in the point or primitive as an int. It will not be added if it has already been specified in the Float attributes.

parameters.name: string
parameters.label: Add String Attributes
parameters.description: Add a non-standard attribute specified in the point or primitive as a string. It will not be added if it has already been specified in the Float or Int attributes.

parameters.name: n
parameters.label: N
parameters.description: Number of points used for building primitives.

parameters.name: prtype
parameters.label: Particle Type
parameters.description: When creating a particle system, specify to render the particles as lines or point sprites.
